_comment: Full cron schedule for when the Vercel project is on the Pro plan. Hobby allows only daily cron (and a small job count), so the live vercel.json keeps just morning-brief and notify. On Pro, copy this crons array into vercel.json to restore the EOD recap, weekly review, and the Granola pull (staging-only since Phase 1; approval gates every write). sync-vault was retired by the Phase 2 cutover: the tasks table is authoritative, so there is no snapshot to refresh. Schedules target Mountain Daylight Time (UTC-6); see PUNCHLIST for the DST note.
